steps.title: Simplify both sides
steps.content:
For infinitely many solutions, both sides must be identical for every value of $x$. Expand each side.
$$a(5x-15)+4a=5ax-15a+4a=5ax-11a$$
$$5(ax-3a)-20=5ax-15a-20$$

steps.title: Match the constant terms
steps.content:
The $5ax$ terms already match, so match the constant terms.
$$-11a=-15a-20$$
Solve for $a$.
$$4a=-20$$
$$a=-5$$

steps.title: Check identity
steps.content:
When $a=-5$, both sides simplify to the same expression.
$$-25x+55=-25x+55$$
So only $a=-5$ works. The answer is A.
